text.title: vui-iot-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Users must say 'turn off Hue Bulb 1234'; nobody remembers IDs.
antipattern.root-cause: No room/zone grouping; raw device IDs surfaced.
antipattern.fix: Group devices into rooms; let users say 'turn off bedroom lights'.

antipattern.symptom: User says 'goodnight'; lights off but thermostat fails silently; user wakes cold.
antipattern.fix: Report per-device outcome on any failure; e.g., 'Lights off; thermostat unreachable.'

antipattern.symptom: User accidentally sets entire house to 18°C; no undo path; must redo all settings.
antipattern.fix: Persist last-command state; voice command 'undo' or 'reverse last action' restores.

antipattern.symptom: Lab test 99% routine accuracy; kitchen-noise field test 60%.
antipattern.fix: Mandate ≥3 noise conditions including kitchen + TV.
